project.name: IsPlayer
project.description: IsPlayer is a Kotlin Android local video player that scans/imports videos, organizes them by folders, stores metadata in Room, and plays videos through a custom Compose/Media3 full-screen player.

layers.name: Application Entry
layers.description: Application-level entry points, Android application setup, and top-level bootstrap files.

layers.name: Presentation
layers.description: Jetpack Compose screens, UI state holders, and reusable UI components for the home library and video player.

layers.name: Domain
layers.description: Business models, repository contracts, and use cases that isolate app behavior from persistence and UI.

layers.name: Data
layers.description: Room database, DAOs, entities, and repository implementation that persist and scan videos/folders.

layers.name: Dependency Injection
layers.description: Hilt modules that provide database, DAO, and repository dependencies.

layers.name: Theme And Design System
layers.description: Compose theme, colors, typography, and visual design constants.

layers.name: Utilities
layers.description: Shared helpers for metadata extraction, formatting, and interaction modifiers.

layers.name: Android Resources
layers.description: XML resources, launcher assets, backup rules, strings, colors, and theme resources.

layers.name: Build And Configuration
layers.description: Gradle, wrapper, version catalog, ProGuard, and build support files.

tour.title: Project Setup
tour.description: Start with Gradle and the manifest to see that this is a Kotlin Compose Android video player using Hilt, Room, Coil, Navigation, and Media3.

tour.title: Application Entry And Navigation
tour.description: MainActivity applies the Compose theme and defines navigation from the home video library to the player route.

tour.title: Home Library Workflow
tour.description: HomeScreen and HomeViewModel handle permissions, search, folder drawer, import, scan, and folder sync workflows.

tour.title: Playback Experience
tour.description: PlayerScreen wraps ExoPlayer in Compose and implements custom gesture-driven controls, playlist selection, locking, speed, and orientation behavior.

tour.title: Domain Boundary
tour.description: Domain models, use cases, and repository contracts describe app behavior without depending on Room or Compose.

tour.title: Persistence And Scanning
tour.description: The data layer stores videos and folders in Room, scans MediaStore, and falls back to bundled asset videos when no device videos are found.

tour.title: Shared UI And Utilities
tour.description: Components, theme files, and utilities provide reusable presentation pieces, metadata extraction, formatting, and animated click behavior.
